{{Quote|The Jedi is the rock-lion at the gate who says, 'I will defend these beings with my life, and that is the sum of me.'|Kina Ha|<ref name="ImpCom">''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]''</ref>}}
The '''Zalorian rock-lion''',<ref name="Droids" /> also known as the '''rock-lion''', was a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]]. The rock-lions' habitat was in the [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] range known as the [[Fantain Mountains]], among the boulders which provided shelter from the planet's strong winds.<ref name="GB" />

[[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]] were alternatively described as resembling an [[Armor/Legends|armored]] rock-lion<ref name="Droids" /> or a cross between a rock-lion and a [[Karran beetle]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|319|war-mount}}</ref> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Read">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places ''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]], the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kina Ha]] compared the duty of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to that of a rock-lion at a gate, ready to give their life in the protection of other beings.<ref name="ImpCom" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rock-lions were first mentioned in the databank entry for Zaloriis in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.<ref name="GB" /> The species was fully identified as the Zalorian rock-lion in the article "[[The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors|The History of the Mandalorians]]," written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and published in the [[Star Wars Insider 80|eightieth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'',<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> which was distributed to subscribers and available on newsstands in [[January]] [[2005]].<ref name="Insider date">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050110.html|text=Clone Wars Continue in ''Insider'' #80}}</ref>
